title: Merlin Labs - REKT
relevance_summary: CAKE deposit followed by getReward call to exploit performanceFee in Binance Smart Chain vault

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends CAKE to a vault contract followed by a getReward call within the same transaction
prevention.trigger: CAKE -> vault contract -> getReward() in single tx

red_flags: CAKE sent to vault contract followed by getReward call
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that sends CAKE to a vault contract followed by a getReward call within the same transaction
summary: The attacker sent CAKE to the LINK-BNB Vault contract and then called getReward, exploiting the performanceFee to mint tokens for themselves. A guard could have blocked this by preventing such sequences.
